response:
Alex reads books.
Books hold stories.
Stories show love.
Love changes views.
Views shift slowly.
Slowly time passes.
Passes days quickly.
Quickly pages turn.
Turn pages daily.
Daily work grows.
Grows mind wide.
Wide thoughts emerge.
Emerge new ideas.
Ideas break norms.
Norms fade away.
Away old rules.
Rules lose power.
Power shifts now.
Now Alex learns.
Lears from texts.
Texts teach much.
Much data exists.
Exists three books.
Books have pages.
Pages count high.
High numbers sum.
Sum totals well.
Well done math.
Math shows rate.
Rate stays same.
Same speed found.
Found daily count.
Count equals thirty.
Thirty pages daily.
